ops.text:
## RESULT — loop COMPLETED (during a session-limit window; recovered from disk, not re-run)

The Option B loop ran to completion at 2026-07-19 19:19:29 UTC while my agent was under a session limit. State recovered from disk; NO re-run (would have double-spent). Verified no rogue/duplicate process was left spending (bracket-grep clean, no live `claude`/`e19.py run`, spend stable). The single run = exactly 296 judge envelopes (4 candidates × 74 rows).

### Outcome: below_mde — NO WINNER (effective ceiling)
final_decision: winner=null, reason="below_mde (delta=0.0270 < mde=0.1080)", leader=c003-m2, n_common=74, delta=0.0270, paired95=[-0.0405, +0.0946] (includes zero).

### Per-candidate (combined, n=74; Wilson95; per-stratum)
- c000-baseline (v6): combined 0.9459 [0.869,0.979] | golden 1.000 (51) · **unreliable/E18 0.8125 (16)** · stratified 0.857 (7)
- c001-m0 (parent baseline): combined 0.9459 | golden 0.980 · unreliable 0.8125 · stratified 1.000  (delta +0.000, CI [-0.081,+0.081])
- c002-m1 (parent c001-m0): combined 0.9595 | golden 0.980 · unreliable 0.875 · stratified 1.000  (delta +0.0135, CI [-0.054,+0.081])
- c003-m2 (parent c002-m1, BEST): combined 0.9730 [0.907,0.993] | golden 1.000 · **unreliable 0.875 (14/16)** · stratified 1.000  (delta +0.0270, CI [-0.041,+0.095])

Lineage = a chain (bandit top-two kept mutating the leader). Prompt grew 7655→15295 chars (108→202 lines; +114/−20). GEPA additions target the E18 fulcrum: operational_directive-vs-direction boundary ("forward words like fix/review aimed at future work aren't steering by themselves"), source-kind-aware rules (interrupt_rejection, plan_review), a "fault in transmission is not a fault in the work" carve-out.

### Why no winner (the instrument insight)
Baseline v6 already scores 0.9459 combined on the clean independent-reference panel (100% golden). Headroom to 1.0 = 0.054 < MDE 0.108, so NO MDE-sized win was declarable from the start — an effective ceiling. The discriminating signal lives in the **unreliable/E18 stratum** (baseline 0.8125, headroom 0.19), where c003-m2 gained +1/16 rows — directionally the E18 fulcrum, but n=16 is far too small and the combined metric is diluted by 51 ceiling-bound golden rows.

### Validation (amendment 4): NOT triggered
delta 0.027 is ~1/4 of MDE and CI includes zero — not "at or near MDE". No opus-validation warranted for this result. Forward path IF the directional contested-stratum signal is worth chasing = deferred Option D: mint fresh independent auditor (opus) references for the ~109 v6-only contested rows (~$41 @ $0.372/row, orchestrator-authorized) → a ~125-row clean contested panel + a CONTESTED-STRATUM-FOCUSED metric (not golden-diluted combined) → far more power to detect a judge improvement on exactly the rows E18 flags.

### Spend
Judge (captured, this loop): $24.795 / 296 envelopes (~$6.2/eval, ~$0.084/row — amortized as predicted; the $0.20/row smoke figure was a concurrency-2 cache-race artifact). Ancillary (fable author ×3 uncaptured ~$1.5, 2-row smoke $0.40, CLI tests ~$0.5) ≈ $2.4. Total ≈ $27, under the $30 cap.

Artifacts: run-summary.json, candidates/{c000-baseline,c001-m0,c002-m1,c003-m2}/{prompt.txt,score.json}, mutation-requests/, capture-run1/ (spend envelopes), panel.json/panel_rows.json — all under /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E19/out/. Ledger CLOSED.
